OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF DE LAGE LANDEN FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is GRANTED. Plaintiff may attach property of the defendant in the amount of $159,722.31. Plaintiff shall post a $10,000 bond which is required before the writ shall issue. Plaintiff shall provide the Court with a Judicial Council order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Defendant's Motion To Set Aside Default is granted. Defendant has shown sufficient facts to warrant relief under the discretionary relief provisions of CCP 473(b) and its motion is supported by California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. Plaintiff's request for costs is denied. Plaintiff could have avoided those costs if it explained to defendant that it was incurring costs due to the default and presumably at that time defendant would have explained its belief that it felt the default was entered erroneously. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org. (D302)
